_publications._publicationTitle: Neuroanatomical correlates of working memory performance in Neurofibromatosis 1.

_contextSnippet: Poorer performance on high working memory load tasks was significantly associated with increased volumes in a small region of inferior lateral parietal lobe (22 voxels)
details: Poorer performance on high working memory load tasks (factor 1) was significantly associated with increased volumes in inferior lateral parietal lobe (22 voxels). Poorer performance on low working memory load (factor 2) was significantly associated with increased volumes in posterior cingulate cortex and other regions
